summary: The author apologizes for accidentally making a competitive notebook public, which caused a potential solution leak for a score of 20.293. They clarify that the notebook was hidden immediately after scoring and is now being made public again to ensure fairness. The post contains no technical details about the approach, as it is purely an administrative clarification regarding the leak.
extensive_summary:
This post is a brief administrative clarification regarding a potential solution leak on Kaggle. The author acknowledges that their notebook, which achieved a score of 20.293, was accidentally made public during the competition. They apologize for the oversight, explain that the notebook was hidden right after scoring concluded, and have since restored public access to ensure all participants have equal opportunity.

The text does not contain any technical writeup, methodology, or competition details. It serves solely as a transparency notice and apology to the community.
